introSection: 7 Picos was a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf formerly located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 10 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
7 Picos was a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf formerly located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.



10 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.
